title: Roland TR-808 Bass Drum
description: Classic analog kick drum from the Roland TR-808 drum machine. Deep, punchy low end perfect for hip-hop and trap.
production_notes: Tune to the root key of your track for best results. Works well at 140-160ms decay.

title: Amen Break
description: The legendary 6-bar drum break from The Winstons' 'Amen Brother' (1969). Foundation of jungle, drum & bass, and hip-hop.
production_notes: Chop and rearrange for variety. Classic at 160-180% speed stretch for jungle.

title: Moog Minimoog Bass Patch
description: Warm, fat Moog bass preset. Classic analog ladder filter sound with slow attack and plenty of drive.
production_notes: Lower cutoff for dubstep vibes. Increase drive for more grit.

title: Rhodes Electric Piano
description: Multi-sampled Fender Rhodes Mark I Stage 73. Includes velocity layers and round-robin samples.
production_notes: 8 velocity layers, 3 round-robins. Best played with slight compression on output.

title: Lo-Fi Drum Kit
description: Complete lo-fi drum kit sampled through a vintage cassette player. Includes kick, snare, hihat, clap, and percussion.
production_notes: Includes 24 samples: 4 kicks, 4 snares, 4 hihats, 4 claps, 4 percussion, 4 FX.

title: Chill Boom Bap Essentials
description: A curated collection of boom bap essentials: sampled drums, vintage synth chops, soul loops, and vinyl crackle. Perfect for East Coast hip-hop production.
production_notes: Contains 150+ samples across 12 categories. See README.txt for folder structure.

title: Vinyl Crackle and Noise
description: Authentic vinyl record crackle noise loop. Perfect for adding warmth and character to lo-fi productions.
production_notes: Loop seamlessly. Mix at -18 to -12 dBFS for subtle effect.

title: 808 Trap Hi-Hat Pattern
description: Trap-style hi-hat pattern with rolling 1/32nd note stutters at 140 BPM. Programmed on Roland TR-808.
production_notes: Pairs well with 808 bass and single kick. Sidechained to kick for movement.

title: Serum Growl Bass Preset
description: Aggressive growl bass for Xfer Serum. Features two oscillators with heavy wavetable morphing and formant filtering.
production_notes: Automate formant and morph X position for evolving movement. Tune to key before use.

title: Soul Piano Chord Loop
description: Warm soul piano chord progression in C minor. Two-bar loop with Fender Rhodes sound and light reverb.
production_notes: Root key Cm. Chords: Cm7 - Fm9 - Bb7 - Ebmaj7. Loop point at bar 3.

title: Sub Bass Sine 808
description: Pure sine wave sub bass 808 hit tuned to C. Long sustain with natural pitch decay. Perfect for modern trap and hip-hop.
production_notes: Pitch-tune in your sampler. Root: C1. Needs high-pass filter for speakers above 80Hz.

title: Orchestral String Section
description: Full section of 48 orchestral strings sampled at multiple dynamic layers. Includes sustain, staccato, pizzicato, and tremolo articulations.
production_notes: 4 dynamic layers (pp, mp, mf, ff). True legato transitions recorded. RAM-heavy.

title: Future Bass Chord Stabs
description: Bright, wide future bass chord stabs in F major. Features supersaw synth with side-chain pumping effect at 150 BPM.
production_notes: Sidechain to kick at 4:1 ratio for pumping. Layer with sub pad for fullness.

title: Acoustic Snare Drum
description: Tight acoustic snare drum hit. Recorded in a dry studio environment with 4 velocity layers.
production_notes: Tuned to approx. G3. Add ~2dB shelf at 5kHz for snap. Works in any genre.

title: Electronic Producer Kit v2
description: Complete electronic drum kit for modern pop and electronic music. Includes punchy kicks, clicky snares, electronic hi-hats, and percussion.
production_notes: 48 total samples. Kick tuned to C. Snare processed with parallel compression.

title: Ambient Pad Texture
description: Evolving ambient pad texture with slow filter sweeps. Great for creating space and depth in any production.
production_notes: Loop at bar 9 for seamless repeat. Tune to your track key before using.

title: Deep House Drum Loop
description: Classic deep house drum pattern at 124 BPM. Features four-on-the-floor kick, open hi-hat shuffle, and rimshot snare.
production_notes: Swing amount: 16%. Gate kick with a 4:1 comp, attack 5ms release 50ms.

title: Kontakt Nylon Guitar
description: Full-range nylon string classical guitar library for Kontakt. Recorded in close-mic and room positions.
production_notes: 5 velocity layers. Chord detection mode included. Built-in finger noise and fret slides.

title: Trap & Drill Reference Tracks
description: A set of reference track notes and analysis for trap and drill mastering. LUFS targets, frequency charts, and EQ comparison notes.
production_notes: Target: -8 LUFS integrated. High shelf +2dB at 10kHz. Sub: -9dB below 50Hz roll-off.

title: Synthwave Lead Preset
description: Glassy synthwave lead preset with slight detuning and chorus. Inspired by 80s sci-fi soundtracks.
production_notes: Apply tape saturation for more character. Pair with gated reverb snare for full 80s vibe.

title: Jazz Upright Bass DI
description: Multi-sampled upright bass recorded via DI from a 1953 Kay bass. Warm and woody tone with authentic bow and pluck articulations.
production_notes: Includes arco and pizzicato. Recorded through Neve 1073 preamp. Minimal processing needed.

title: Afrobeats Essentials Pack
description: Complete afrobeats production collection: talking drums, shekere, agogo, melodic afro bass, and guitar loops. All at 95-105 BPM.
production_notes: 200+ samples across drums, bass, melodic, and atmosphere. BPM range 95-105.

title: Kick + Snare Bounce Loop
description: Tight bounce groove loop with tight kick and rimshot snare at 95 BPM. Perfect for boom bap and lo-fi hip-hop.
production_notes: Swing: 54%. SP-1200 style crunch added. Layer additional perc on top for complexity.

title: Frequency Reference Guide
description: Comprehensive frequency reference chart covering the audible spectrum with instrument ranges, mix zones, and problem frequencies for common production situations.
production_notes: Sub: 20-60Hz, Bass: 60-250Hz, Low-mid: 250-500Hz, Mid: 500Hz-2kHz, High-mid: 2-6kHz, Air: 6-20kHz

title: Reese Bass Patch
description: Classic Reese bass patch originating from Kevin Saunderson's 'Just Wanna Dance' (1988). Dual detuned sawtooth oscillators for dense, rumbling low-end.
source: Inspired by Kevin Saunderson - original design
production_notes: Detune second osc +5 cents for classic sound. Add formant filter for movement.

title: Electronic Drums Collection
description: Curated library of electronic drum machines from the 80s and 90s: TR-808, TR-909, LinnDrum, DMX, and more. Over 500 individual hits.
production_notes: Each machine has its own subfolder. All samples normalized to -18 dBFS. 500+ total hits.

title: Flute Breath Hit
description: Short breathy flute hit with natural reverb tail. Adds organic texture to electronic or acoustic productions.
production_notes: Tune to scale. Layer with synth pad for hybrid organic/electronic texture.

title: Mix Bus Chain Reference
description: Documented mix bus chain settings: compressor, EQ, limiter, and saturation settings with specific notes per genre.
production_notes: SSL G-Bus comp: Ratio 4:1, Attack 30ms, Release Auto. EQ: +1dB at 30Hz, -0.5dB at 300Hz.

title: Example Kick (Preview Demo)
description: Placeholder entry demonstrating how preview_path should be set. Replace file_path and preview_path with real files. Supported formats: previews/file.mp3, /previews/file.mp3, or an absolute CDN URL such as https://cdn.example.com/previews/demo-kick.mp3.
production_notes: Delete or replace this entry. Add the real preview file to public/previews/demo-kick.mp3 (keep files < 1 MB).
